themes.name: 'Skin cancer or not?' 5-second quiz wave
themes.receipt: 4 breakouts - 1 creator's format - 6.3M views this fortnight - three >100x monsters - 5s winning

videos.author: dr.derm.love
videos.caption: Skin cancer or not? Melanoma, sk, keloid

videos.author: dr.derm.love
videos.caption: Skin cancer or not? Skin tag, melanoma, seborrheic keratosis

videos.author: dr.derm.love
videos.caption: Skin cancer or not? Bcc, dermatofibroma, melanoma

videos.author: dr.derm.love
videos.caption: Is it skin cancer or not? Melanoma, skin tag, melanoma

her_coverage.summary: Deep, current: BCC explainer 317K - 4d ago (IG); 'how did you diagnose your skin cancer' community post <1d ago; Kirby_J BCC react 4d ago; BCC ultimate guide 493K (YT) in library

themes.corpus_position: Basal cell carcinoma is the most common type of skin cancer — her explainers teach recognition (pearly, non-healing) and early diagnosis, from a Mohs surgeon's chair.

angles.angle: adopt the 5s quiz: three lesions, one is cancer — Mohs edition
quiz then explain: why THAT one was the BCC
pair quizzes with substantive follow-ups — quizzes buy reach, not follows

themes.name: Derms rate what's worth your money
themes.receipt: 6 creators on the format - 3 ♥ gold magnets - dermatologysurgeon's rating series alone: 3.4M + 2.5M + 2.0M + 1.8M (IG, 14d) - 5–10s winning

videos.author: drgeria
videos.caption: If you're gonna spend it, make it worth it!

videos.author: dermatologysurgeon
videos.caption: dermatologist rates viral skincare trends — dry brushing (2/10): damages the skin barrier

her_coverage.summary: Rating format is hers already: bad-better-best 130K - 7d ago (IG); hyperpigmentation product faves 360K - 7d ago (IG). The explicit money-framing ('worth every penny') is the open variant.

themes.corpus_position: Bad-better-best: do you agree with these dermatologist ratings? — her established rating format; her picks lean drugstore-accessible ('all of these are available at a drugstore').

angles.angle: 'worth every penny' — Mohs-surgeon edition, 3 picks in 8s
splurge-vs-save: her hyperpigmentation faves at drugstore prices
make it a running series — series formats over-index on follows

themes.name: Glass skin — HER wave
themes.receipt: YOURS: (TT) 1.5M in 4.8d - ♥ gold, top-1% eng + (IG) 1.3M - ♥ silver - plus 108x k-beauty face-mask breakout riding the same seed - 5–15s winning

videos.author: drabby6
videos.caption: And don't forget to exfoliate 1-2 times a week! What's your glass skin care routine?

videos.author: abby.waldmanmd
videos.caption: And don't forget to exfoliate 1-2 times a week! Don't use retinoids when pregnant.

her_coverage.summary: The wave IS hers: superviral routine on both platforms this week; glass-skin trifecta 12d ago (75K TT / 126K IG) set it up.

themes.corpus_position: The trifecta skincare for glass skin — azelaic acid, tretinoin, zinc oxide; exfoliate 1–2x a week; no retinoids when pregnant (her videos, verbatim).

angles.angle: pregnancy-safe glass skin — expand your caption swaps into the video
crossover: the glass-skin routine that's worth every penny

themes.name: Doctors answer: what they'd never let their kids do
themes.receipt: (IG) 1.13M in 2.9d - 1% breakout - ♥ gold + (TT) 101K - 3% + Part 2 49K - 3% - ♥ silver — community-answer format with built-in series momentum

videos.author: teawithmd
videos.caption: You ask a room full of doctors one question: What's something you'd never let your own kids do?

videos.author: teawithmd
videos.caption: You ask a room full of doctors one question: What's something you'd never let your own kids do?

videos.author: teawithmd
videos.caption: You guys loved Part 1, so here's Part 2.

her_coverage.summary: No parenting-rules video; adjacent sun-safety stances are solid but older — UV-index tanning reminder 169K (IG, 13d), kids-sunscreen Q&A dates to 2023.

themes.corpus_position: Play this video whenever you need a reminder NOT to go out and tan when the UV is high (her IG reminder) — firm anti-tanning, sunscreen-every-day stance; personal never-list not yet on camera.

angles.angle: derm-mom edition: what I'd never let my kids do
lead with tanning beds — your UV-index stance on camera
invite colleagues into an answer chain — community formats grow followers

more_topics.receipt: 1075x - Dr. Scott Walter - 3.6M in 13d (YT) - ♥ gold; plus '4 Vaseline hacks' 1.2M in 10d (IG)
more_topics.note: Aging wave but enormous; her corpus take exists: never Vaseline/occlusives OVER active ingredients.
Habits-first framing (UPF, hat, shade) — clean fit with her sun-safety library; 8d old.
Her underexploited high-ceiling lane; fresh signal this week.
Aged out for reacting; proves demand for shame-free HSV explainers.
Old but a 482x monster — melasma hooks keep printing; she has hyperpigmentation faves to extend.

her_wins.summary: Glass-skin routine — superviral on BOTH platforms: (TT) 1.5M in 4.8d - ♥ gold, top-1% engagement (a follower magnet, not just reach) + (IG) 1.3M - ♥ silver - 5% breakout on both
her_wins.open_lane: Extend, don't pivot: part 2 nighttime routine, pregnancy-safe standalone, or the worth-every-penny crossover — magnet profile says series/substantive follow-up converts follows.

stitch_shortlist.author: @dermatologysurgeon
stitch_shortlist.claim: Dollar Tree skincare, rated by a derm

pitch.the_claim: A derm rated Dollar Tree skincare — and some of it passed.
pitch.why_it_stitches: 1.8M in 1.8d (~1M/day) - ♥ silver, top-2% eng - budget skincare is a comment magnet; fellow derm, so the angle must be 'yes, and'.
pitch.your_fit: Your bad-better-best rating format ran 7d ago; your picks already lean drugstore ('all of these are available at a drugstore'). 'Yes, and' — what YOU'D actually grab for $1.25.
angles: 'yes, and': my three Dollar Tree passes, as a Mohs surgeon
what $1.25 skincare can't do — and what it honestly can

stitch_shortlist.author: @yurileeeee
stitch_shortlist.claim: Homemade gelatin-maple candy = collagen for your skin

pitch.the_claim: Eat this gelatin-maple candy and it's 'the best tasting collagen' for glowing skin.
pitch.why_it_stitches: ~1.6M combined in <3d (798K TT + 767K IG) - ♥ gold both - recipe format spreading; half-right claim from a lifestyle creator — punches sideways.
pitch.your_fit: She's on record: 'I was actually surprised — systematic reviews show collagen supplements do help the appearance of your skin, particularly fish and porcine derived' BUT 'protein is protein … I'd like to see it compared to just a high-protein diet' (her collagen video, 30K TT). And her 'sugar sag' glycation explainer cuts straight against the maple syrup.
angles: half-right: gelatin IS collagen — here's the catch
'sugar sag': the maple syrup is fighting the gelatin
switch-don't-quit: the evidence-backed way to get the benefit

stitch_shortlist.author: @kelswansondermpa
stitch_shortlist.claim: Hypochlorous acid spray is next-level skincare

pitch.the_claim: Hypochlorous acid spray is the next-level trending skincare step.
pitch.why_it_stitches: 75x breakout (3%) on the hype claim; evergreen product question her audience keeps asking. Miss recorded: 8.9d old — past the rising window.
pitch.your_fit: Direct corpus position: 'spray your back with hypochlorous acid' before/after workouts for body breakouts (her body-acne video, 48K). She can say exactly when it earns a slot — and when it's overhyped.
angles: yes, and — here's when hypochlorous actually earns its slot
what it does (and doesn't) on intact facial skin

stitch_shortlist.author: @yurileeeee
stitch_shortlist.claim: Daily olive oil + lemon shot for 'filter' skin

pitch.the_claim: An olive oil & lemon shot every day is step one to filter-flawless skin.
pitch.why_it_stitches: Same creator as the collagen candy — her glow recipes are surging (♥ silver, top-6% eng); DIY-ingestible claims are her audience's weak spot. Miss recorded: 4.0d, at the edge of rising.
pitch.your_fit: Her diet video covers 'everything scientifically proven about diet and supplements for skin aging' — but there's no olive-oil-lemon position in the corpus: the specific shot verdict needs her take.
angles: empathy-first: love the glow goal — here's what actually moves it
diet-and-skin science vs. the morning shot (needs her take)

more_stitches.author: @ninaghoulina
more_stitches.claim: Viral makeup products put to the test (165s)

pitch.the_claim: 'She said TRY so I did' — testing viral beauty products head-to-head.
pitch.why_it_stitches: 5.3M - ♥ gold, top-5% eng - 3% breakout. Lane call is borderline (makeup, not derm claims) — watch first; if any skin-prep/primer claim appears, the audience inherit is huge.

pitch.the_claim: Two doctors score supplements 1–10 on camera.
pitch.why_it_stitches: 291K on day one (~291K/day pace, 5% breakout) — in-group derms, so 'yes, and' only. Her collagen verdict is sharper than most scoring.
angles: 'yes, and': the collagen score I'd change — with the systematic-review receipts

more_stitches.author: @derm.talk
more_stitches.claim: One-stop derm product lineup (body odor, barrier repair…)

pitch.the_claim: Save-this shopping list: a product per concern.
pitch.why_it_stitches: 221K/day pace, 3% breakout — but a fellow-derm listicle with nothing wrong in it: stitch value low, format-steal value higher.
angles: your version: the Mohs surgeon's one-stop shelf
